description: Diagnose DotCraft errors and help report them to the developers.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose DotCraft errors and report issues
interface.longDescription: DotCraft Doctor inspects a failed turn from local .craft evidence to explain what went wrong, then helps turn the findings into a clear issue report for the DotCraft developers. It is the plugin the composer mascot installs when you ask it to look into an error.
interface.defaultPrompt: Diagnose DotCraft errors and draft an issue.
